# Axiom LLC — Customer Policy Document

## 1. Refund Policy

Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date. Refund requests must be submitted via the support portal at support.axiom-llc.com. Refunds are processed within 5–7 business days and returned to the original payment method. After the 30-day window has elapsed, refunds are not available; however, store credit may be issued at management discretion for extenuating circumstances.

Digital products that have been downloaded or activated are non-refundable after 48 hours of purchase, regardless of the 30-day window, unless the product is defective. A product is considered defective if it fails to perform its core advertised function on a supported platform.

## 2. Cancellation Policy

Subscription cancellations must be submitted at least 7 days before the next billing cycle to avoid being charged for the following period. Cancellations take effect at the end of the current billing period; access is not terminated immediately. Annual subscribers who cancel within the first 14 days of a new annual term are eligible for a prorated refund for the unused months.

To cancel, navigate to Account Settings > Subscription > Cancel Subscription. Cancellation confirmation will be sent to the email address on file within 1 business day.

## 3. Shipping and Delivery

Standard shipping is available for physical goods and takes 5–10 business days within the continental United States. Expedited shipping (2–3 business days) is available at an additional fee. Overnight shipping is available for orders placed before 2:00 PM Eastern Time on business days.

International shipping is available to 42 countries. Delivery times for international orders range from 10–21 business days depending on destination and customs processing. Axiom LLC is not responsible for customs duties, import taxes, or delays caused by customs agencies.

Orders over $150 qualify for free standard shipping within the continental United States.

## 4. Privacy and Data Retention

Axiom LLC collects only the minimum personal data required to fulfill services: name, email address, billing address, and payment method (stored via our PCI-compliant payment processor; raw card data is never stored on Axiom servers). Usage analytics are collected in aggregate and are not tied to individual identities unless the user has opted in to personalized analytics.

User data is retained for a maximum of 36 months following account closure. Users may request deletion of their data at any time by submitting a data deletion request to privacy@axiom-llc.com. Deletion is completed within 30 days. Some data may be retained longer if required by applicable law (e.g., financial transaction records for tax compliance, up to 7 years).

## 5. Support and Service Level

Standard support is available Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM Eastern Time, excluding federal holidays. Response time for standard support tickets is within 1 business day.

Priority support is available to Enterprise tier subscribers and guarantees a response within 4 business hours. Critical issues (service outages, data loss) are escalated immediately regardless of tier.

Community support via the public forums is available 24/7 and is moderated by Axiom staff during business hours.

## 6. Acceptable Use

Users may not use Axiom services to transmit spam, malware, or unlawful content. Automated scraping of Axiom platforms without prior written authorization is prohibited. Accounts found in violation of the acceptable use policy will be suspended pending review; repeat or severe violations will result in permanent termination without refund.

Users are responsible for all activity that occurs under their account credentials. Multi-user accounts must ensure all sub-users comply with this policy.

## 7. Service Availability

Axiom LLC targets 99.9% monthly uptime for all production services. Scheduled maintenance windows are announced at least 72 hours in advance via the status page at status.axiom-llc.com and by email notification. Emergency maintenance may occur without advance notice in the event of a security incident or critical infrastructure failure.

Downtime caused by third-party providers (e.g., cloud infrastructure, payment processors) does not count against the Axiom uptime SLA.
